The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities. — Stephen Covey
Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you. — Anne Lamott
Your mind is for having ideas, not holding them. — David Allen
Be present in all things and thankful for all things. — Maya Angelou
Silence is not empty. It is full of answers.
The present moment is the only moment available to us. — Thich Nhat Hanh
Focus on being productive instead of busy. — Tim Ferriss
You will never find time for anything. If you want time, you must make it. — Charles Buxton
Digital distraction is the enemy of depth. — Cal Newport
Every time you check your phone unnecessarily, you are borrowing time from your future self.
